title: Production Checklist for File-Grounded AI Analytics
summary: Moving Talk to Data from pilot to production requires checklist governance, not enthusiasm alone.

content.summary: Moving Talk to Data from pilot to production requires checklist governance, not enthusiasm alone.

body.text: Pilots tolerate mismatch; production requires repeatable verification and ownership. Confirm DPAs, define tiered trust policies, publish column naming standards, create saved rules for each official metric slice. Run parallel weeks against finance control totals until discrepancies are explainable.

body.caption: Team meeting with presentation screen. Photo: Unsplash

body.text: Confirm DPAs, define tiered trust policies, publish column naming standards, create saved rules for each official metric slice.
Run parallel weeks against finance control totals until discrepancies are explainable.

items: Named owners for each recurring export.
Escalation path when chart and AI disagree.
Quarterly audit sample of AI-assisted slides.

body.text: Review mismatches monthly. Update rules when business definitions change. Retire prompts tied to deprecated columns.
Production AI analytics is boring—in the good way—when checklists run every week.
Datilio supports production rollout with preview, rules, charts, and grounded Talk to Data in one checklist-friendly flow.

meta_description: Moving Talk to Data from pilot to production requires checklist governance, not enthusiasm alone.
